g.text: "On the Wrong Side of the Door"
Plot the coordinates the voice keeps rea...
Bike out to the abandoned relay station.
Dig out the previous listener logbook.
Climb to the ridge water tower.
Dismiss it as old junk and move on.
Follow the thread back to the relay.
Just log the frequency and leave.
Trace it to the headland source.
Search the service box at the base.
Follow the cable to the relay.
Take the coast path along the fence.
Photograph the mast and turn back.
Try the gatehouse and its log board.
Wade to the humming transformer hut.
Duck into the flooded cellar entrance.
Grab a torn log page and slip away.
Carry the log toward the source.
Chase down who M might be.
Face the source of the signal.
Open the cedar trunk in the attic.
Untie the ribboned bundle of letters.
Read the letter that names Alder.
Feel it is too private and stop.
Take up the question he left.
Chase the card naming KX Alder.
Set the postcards aside for now.
Try to force the padlocked cabinet.
Follow Alder thread to the source.
Test it as a book cipher.
Test it as a countdown of timestamps.
Switch to the underlined second book.
See what the count is measuring.
Admit the cipher has beaten her.
Learn what the clock ends on.
Map the pattern onto a calendar.
Commit to the date and push on.
Decide she is imagining the pattern.
Ask Mrs. Okafor at the marina.
Photograph the pages before it closes.
Promise her you mean to help.
Waver, and let her send you home.
Take in the weight of it.
Find out what the countdown reaches.
Test M as a place on the map.
Check the mooring the chart shows.
Give up the map as a dead end.
Turn the search toward Marin herself.
Test it against the tide and weather.
Read zero as the power cell dying.
Read zero as a final message firing.
Resolve to catch it before it erases.
Warn someone about the storm and relay.
Hold back until she is certain.
Decide how to spend that hour.
Get help from people who can reach it.
Go over the fence into the yard.
Take the service road to the back.
Push straight for the control room.
Seize the mic and answer the signal.
Try to stabilize the dying power cell.
Bridge the line to Marin and play it.
Halt the wipe and save the archive.
Splice in the spare and call it in.
Nurse the dying cell by hand.
Find Alder himself at the console.
Find the back door locked, and wait.
Convince Alder to send it live.
Fail to move him, and leave a note.
Call the town radio club net.
Boost the loop and call for Marin.
Push the old rig past its limits.
Trust a neighbor heard, and stop.
Push it onto the county net now.
Chase the lead two ridges west.
Log every lead for the club to follow.
Convince him to dispatch a crew.
Watch him dismiss it as static.
Have them trace and reach Marin.
Have them secure and save the relay.
Team up with Ruiz to reach the relay.
Step back and let Ruiz finish it.
